description_long: This is a simple, modern round table accompanied by three matching chairs, all constructed from a uniform brown material that resembles wood. The table features a circular top supported by a sturdy, straight-legged base, while each chair has a flat seat, straight legs, and a rectangular backrest with two horizontal slats. The design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing functionality and clean lines. The proportions suggest it is suitable for small gatherings or casual dining, likely accommodating three people comfortably. The finish appears matte, with a hard, smooth surface typical of varnished or painted wood. This set would be well-suited for use in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or communal indoor spaces.
description: A minimalist round table with three matching brown chairs, all featuring clean lines and a matte wood-like finish. The set is functional and unadorned, ideal for casual seating in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop and three chairs, with the central chair directly facing the viewer.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing the round tabletop and three chairs, with the central chair slightly angled.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the central chair and table still prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view of the set, showing the back of the central chair and the round tabletop.
